[Adaptive Local Roadmap: Other]

• PHASE 1 (Core Focus): Dedicate 60% of your daily 4h block to [DSA] revision.
• PHASE 2 (Spaced Recall): Solve mock tests every 3 days. Dedicate 2 hours to active diagnostic corrections.
• RECOVERY: Take a 15-minute screen-free walk after every 90-minute focus study block to avoid early burnout.
